title: QUADRA_HC: A whole-body dataset of paired low-dose CT and FDG PET scans
text: QUADRA_HC contains paired test and retest whole-body FDG PET and low-dose CT acquisitions from healthy adults. It supports methodological research and repeatability analysis; a healthy cohort alone does not establish diagnostic performance for vascular disease.

title: EANM procedure guidelines for tumour imaging with FDG PET/CT: version 2.0
text: Standardized uptake values are influenced by acquisition, reconstruction, uptake time, body-size normalization, and region definition. Quantitative comparisons require consistent methodology and quality control.

title: Partial-volume effect in PET tumor imaging
text: Limited PET spatial resolution causes measured activity in small structures to differ from true activity. Partial-volume effects depend on lesion size, shape, contrast, and surrounding background and can bias uptake quantification.

title: PET/CT artifacts
text: Spatial mismatch between PET and CT can create localization and attenuation-correction artifacts. Registration quality should be reviewed when interpreting fused images or measurements derived from small targets.
